title: Track exec sessions and relax exec locking
body:
Obsoletes #394 

Almost a wholescale rewrite of our Exec() code with the goal of reducing the locking around it, so that other commands can use a container while Exec() is running (e.g. `podman ps` will not hang if `podman exec` is running on a container).

comments.body: did this fix issue #402 and if so, how about an integration test?
@baude Checking, but I suspect it was not a complete fix

So we are improved from our current state, in that we actually report errors. But we are returning the wrong error codes - we print out "Error -1" and return -127 for example

@baude Should we fix that here or merge this and fix separately?
i only brought it up because I had Ed's issue in the back of my mind.  different PR is fine.
@baude are you ok with this patch?
I would like to get this merged so we can get it into tomorrows podman release.

:pushpin: Commit 535ae27 has been approved by `baude`
